title: Project : VMC
description: Project : Minecraft is a meticulously crafted modpack designed to modernize Minecraft 1.21.8 while preserving its core identity. It combines bleeding-edge performance optimization with stunning visual fidelity, creating a game that feels like a sequel.
body:
# 🚀 Project : VMC
### The Ultimate High-Fidelity Vanilla+ Experience

> **⚠️ PRE-RELEASE NOTICE:**
> This is the **Alpha/Pre-release** version of *Project : VMC*.
> This is my very first modpack! While I have manually patched conflicts and tuned performance, you may encounter minor bugs. Please report any issues so I can fix them in the next update.

---

## 📖 Overview
**Project : VMC** is a meticulously crafted modpack designed to modernize Minecraft 1.21.8 while preserving its core identity. It combines bleeding-edge performance optimization with stunning visual fidelity, creating a game that feels like a sequel to vanilla.

We focus on two things: **Uncompromising Performance** and **Immersive Beauty**.

---

## 💎 Core Pillars

### 1. ⚡ Uncompromising Performance
This is not just "another fabric pack." It features a **Deeply Tuned Engine** custom-built for MacOS/Apple Silicon but acts as a powerhouse on all systems.

* **Render Engine:** Powered by **Sodium + Iris** for high-FPS rendering and shader support.
* **Logic Optimization:** **Lithium, FerriteCore, and ModernFix** ensure the internal server runs tick-perfect.
* **Chunk Loading:** **C2ME** (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine) provides rapid chunk generation.
* **Zero Conflict:** All optimization mods (Entity Culling, More Culling, BadOptimizations) have been **manually patched** to ensure 0% redundancy.

### 2. 🌄 Infinite Horizons
Experience the world with no boundaries.
* **Distant Horizons:** LOD (Level of Detail) rendering allows you to see terrain dozens of kilometers away with zero performance cost.
* **Tuned for Speed:** Custom threading and blending settings ensure seamless LOD generation without stuttering.

### 3. 🎨 Immersive Visuals & Audio
* **Particle Overhaul:** A hand-tuned blend of *Particle Rain* and *Particular*.
* **Atmosphere:** Falling leaves in forests, fireflies in swamps, and realistic rain ripples.
* **Animation:** **Fresh Animations** brings mobs to life with realistic movement (climbing, eating, falling).
* **Physics:** **Visuality** adds physical particles to block hits and mob damage.
* **Audio:** **Sound Physics Remastered** provides realistic reverb and sound attenuation through walls and caves.

### 4. ⚔️ The "Whimscape" Aesthetic
The visual identity is defined by the **Whimscape** resource pack suite:
* **16x16 RPG Style:** A crisp, adventurous look that respects vanilla resolution.
* **Dark Mode:** Unique Dark UI for a comfortable viewing experience.
* **Full Integration:** Patches included for Fresh Animations, Better Ores, and EMI.

---

## 🛠️ Technical Specifications

* **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.8 (Fabric)
* **Loader:** Fabric Loader
* **RAM Recommendation:** 6-8GB Allocated.
  
---

## 💿 Installation & Setup

1.  Download the modpack via the Modrinth App.
2.  Allocate **6GB to 8GB of RAM** in your launcher settings.

*Project : VMC — The way the game was meant to be played.*
